speaker: Huber
content: Hello, Julie. I talked to your mom about donating some clothes for Eddie.

speaker: Julie
content: She's at Mrs. Van De Kamp's. But I'll see if she left some stuff upstairs.
mark: upstairs adv. 往楼上，在楼上；脑力上，精神上

speaker: Huber
content: Oh, Julie. I was just admiring your new measuring cup.
mark: admire v. 钦佩，仰慕；欣赏，观赏

speaker: Julie
mark: ours pron.我们的，属于我们的

speaker: Julie
content: So I couldn't find the clothes, I'm sorry.

speaker: Julie
content: If you want me to keep looking?

speaker: Huber
content: No, you've done more than enough. Truly.
mark: more than enough 超过所需的数量或程度
you've done more than enough. 你做得已经够多了
truly adv. 真实地，如实地；真正地，完全地；真诚地；准确地；非常，很
